message:
test(snapshots): add TOON-format golden snapshots for list, show, ready (beads_rust-4tj3)

3 frozen insta snapshots capturing exact TOON-rendered output:
- br list --all --sort title --format toon
- br show bd-ready-p0 --format toon
- br ready --sort priority --limit 0 --format toon

Uses deterministic fixture with open/closed/blocked/assigned issues.
Normalizes only generated_at timestamps.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
